exploring.description: Reading and scanning the codebase to understand how things work

planning.description: Deciding what to change and how, before touching any code

implementing.description: Writing and editing code to build the requested feature or fix

verifying.description: Running tests and checks to make sure the changes work correctly

debugging.description: Tracking down and fixing a problem in the code

configuring.description: Setting up or adjusting project settings and dependencies

delegating.description: Handing off a piece of work to a specialized helper agent
